subcodes.first_line: The Will of God, exalted be His glory, prevaileth and His decree floweth forth. Should all the dwellers of earth and heaven gather to prevent [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مشیت حق جل جلاله نافذ و امرش جاری اگر جمیع اهل ارض و سما جمع شوند بر منع
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @goodly deeds; actions, @chastisement and requital, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
